title: AllianceBernstein
body:
AllianceBernstein Holding L.P. (AB) is a global asset-management firm providing investment-management and research services worldwide to institutional, high-net-worth and retail investors.
AllianceBernstein's headquarters is located in Nashville, Tennessee; the firm also has locations throughout the world. It has approximately US$867 billion in assets under management as of 31 December 2025.
